fixtureDescription: Emoji-heavy social media post about a shopping day
passage: OMG 😱😱 just had the BEST day ever!! 🎉🎊 Went shopping with my bestie 👯‍♀️ and found the cutest shoes 👟✨ at the mall 🏬 Then we grabbed lunch 🍕🍔 at this amazing new restaurant 🍽️ The food was absolutely incredible 🤤💯 Can't wait to go back next weekend!! 😍🙌 #blessed #bestdayever #foodie 🥰

items.definition: used to say that a particular day was the most enjoyable one has had
used to express excitement or eagerness about something upcoming
the Saturday and Sunday of the coming week
going to stores to buy things
most attractive or charming in an endearing way (superlative of cute)
a large building with many shops inside
a meal eaten in the middle of the day
a place where people pay to eat meals
extremely good or impressive; hard to believe
feeling very lucky and grateful (used informally to express happiness)
a person who is very interested in food and eating (informal)
